summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Fit With Reshmi landing page. All major sections and interactive elements are working correctly including FAQ accordion, countdown timer, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Button hover effect test failed due to element instability caused by shake animation

passed_tests: Page loads correctly without errors
Header with 'Fit With Reshmi' branding displays correctly
Top banner with offer text is visible
Hero section with headline '100+ Women Have Reversed PCOS With Reshmi'
Stats section with 4 statistics (100+ women healed, 36kg, 8+ guides, 100% natural)
Transformations section with transformation cards
Problem section with 'You're Not Broken' headline
Solution section with 3-step formula
Testimonials section with video placeholders and quotes
Why Choose section with comparison table
What You Get section with benefits list
Meet Your Coach section with Reshmi's profile
Process section with 4 steps
Reviews section with scrolling images and animation
FAQ section with 6 accordion items that expand/collapse on click
Footer with branding and links
Sticky CTA bar at bottom with countdown timer
All CTA buttons styled with pink gradient and shake animation
Mobile responsive design works correctly
Timer countdown functionality works and updates
No console errors detected
All images loading properly
Font Awesome icons loading correctly
Google Fonts (Outfit) loading correctly
